MotoGP Dissertation

Camilla Piccione

2026-05-13

MotoGP

MotoGP2025_Race <- read_table("MotoGP2025_Race.txt")
## 
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## cols(
##   .default = col_character()
## )
## ℹ Use `spec()` for the full column specifications.
MotoGP2025_Sprint <- read_table("MotoGP2025_Sprint.txt")
## 
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## cols(
##   .default = col_character()
## )
## ℹ Use `spec()` for the full column specifications.
MotoGP2024_Race <- read_table("MotoGP2024_Race.txt")
## 
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## cols(
##   .default = col_character()
## )
## ℹ Use `spec()` for the full column specifications.
MotoGP2024_Sprint <- read_table("MotoGP2024_Sprint.txt")
## 
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## cols(
##   .default = col_character()
## )
## ℹ Use `spec()` for the full column specifications.
MotoGP2023_Race <- read_table("MotoGP2023_Race.txt")
## 
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## cols(
##   .default = col_character()
## )
## ℹ Use `spec()` for the full column specifications.
MotoGP2023_Sprint <- read_table("MotoGP2023_Sprint.txt")
## 
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## cols(
##   .default = col_character()
## )
## ℹ Use `spec()` for the full column specifications.

MotoGP2025

Sprint Race 25

head(MotoGP2025_Sprint)
## # A tibble: 6 × 25
##   Rider  Bike  Team  S.THA S.ARG S.AME S.QAT S.SPA S.FRA S.GBR S.ARA S.ITA S.NED
##   <chr>  <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>
## 1 M.Mar… Duca… Duca… 1     1     1     1     1     1     2     1     1     1    
## 2 A.Mar… Duca… BK8G… 2     2     2     2     2     2     1     2     2     2    
## 3 Bezze… Apri… Apri… 12    6     10    9     8     17    4     8     6     3    
## 4 Acosta KTM   RedB… 6     9     7     11    10    19    8     5     Ret   9    
## 5 Bagna… Duca… Duca… 3     3     3     8     3     NC    6     12    3     5    
## 6 Di_Gi… Duca… Pert… Ret   5     4     6     6     7     3     6     5     4    
## # ℹ 12 more variables: S.GER <chr>, S.CZE <chr>, S.AUT <chr>, S.HUN <chr>,
## #   S.CAT <chr>, S.RSM <chr>, S.JPN <chr>, S.INA <chr>, S.AUS <chr>,
## #   S.MAL <chr>, S.POR <chr>, S.VAL <chr>
top5_sprint <- MotoGP2025_Sprint %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = S.THA:S.VAL,
    names_to = "Sprint_Race",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Position = as.numeric(Result),
    Sprint_Race = factor(Sprint_Race, levels = names(MotoGP2025_Sprint)[4:25])
  )
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `mutate()`.
## ℹ In argument: `Position = as.numeric(Result)`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NA introdotti per coercizione
ggplot(top5_sprint, aes(x = Sprint_Race, y = Position, colour = Rider, group = Rider)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 Riders Sprint Race Performance 2025",
    x = "Sprint Race",
    y = "Finishing Position",
    colour = "Rider"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
## Warning: Removed 4 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).
## Warning: Removed 12 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

Race 2025

head(MotoGP2025_Race)
## # A tibble: 6 × 25
##   Rider  Bike  Team  THA   ARG   AME   QAT   SPA   FRA   GBR   ARA   ITA   NED  
##   <chr>  <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>
## 1 M_Mar… Duca… Duca… 1     1     Ret   1     12    2     3     1     1     1    
## 2 A_Mar… Duca… BK8G… 2     2     2     6     1     Ret   5     2     2     Ret  
## 3 Bezze… Apri… Apri… 6     Ret   6     9     14    14    1     8     5     2    
## 4 Acosta KTM   RedB… 19    8     Ret   8     7     4     6     4     8     4    
## 5 Bagna… Duca… Duca… 3     4     1     2     3     16    Ret   3     4     3    
## 6 Di_Gi… Duca… Pert… 10    5     3     16    5     8     9     9     3     6    
## # ℹ 12 more variables: GER <chr>, CZE <chr>, AUT <chr>, HUN <chr>, CAT <chr>,
## #   RSM <chr>, JPN <chr>, INA <chr>, AUS <chr>, MAL <chr>, POR <chr>, VAL <chr>
top5_race <- MotoGP2025_Race %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = THA:VAL,
    names_to = "Race",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Position = as.numeric(Result),
    Race = factor(Race, levels = names(MotoGP2025_Race)[4:25])
  )
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `mutate()`.
## ℹ In argument: `Position = as.numeric(Result)`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NA introdotti per coercizione
ggplot(top5_race, aes(x = Race, y = Position, colour = Rider, group = Rider)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 Riders Race Performance 2025",
    x = "Race",
    y = "Finishing Position",
    colour = "Rider"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
## Warning: Removed 10 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).
## Warning: Removed 23 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

Analysis of the race 2025

moto_2025<-read.table("GP_2025.txt")

L2025<- ordertable2supp(moto_2025[,-ncol(moto_2025)])
head(L2025)
## Warning in print.hyper2(x): powers have nonzero sum
## log(A_Espargaro^8 * (A_Espargaro + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Acosta +
## Aldeguer + Bagnaia + Bastianini + Bezzecchi + Binder + Bulega + Chantra
## + Di_Giannantonio + M_Marquez + Marini + Martin + Miller + Mir +
## Morbidelli + Nakagami + Ogura + Oliveira + P_Espargaro + Pirro +
## Quartararo + R.Fernandez + Rins + Savadori + Vinales)^-1 * (A_Espargaro
## + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Acosta + Aldeguer + Bagnaia + Bastianini +
## Bezzecchi + Binder + Bulega + Chantra + Di_Giannantonio + M_Marquez +
## Marini + Martin + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli + Nakagami + Ogura +
## Oliveira + P_Espargaro + Pirro + Quartararo + R.Fernandez + Rins +
## Savadori + Vinales + Zarco)^-44 * (A_Espargaro + A_Fernandez +
## A_Marquez + Acosta + Aldeguer + Bagnaia + Bastianini + Bezzecchi +
## Binder + Bulega + Chantra + Di_Giannantonio + M_Marquez + Marini +
## Martin + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli + Nakagami + Ogura + Oliveira +
## P_Espargaro + Pirro + Quartararo + Rins + Savadori + Vinales +
## Zarco)^-1 * (A_Espargaro + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Acosta + Aldeguer
## + Bagnaia + Bastianini + Bezzecchi + Binder + Bulega + Chantra +
## Di_Giannantonio + Marini + Martin + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli +
## Nakagami + Ogura + Oliveira + P_Espargaro + Pirro + Quartararo +
## R.Fernandez + Rins + Savadori + Vinales)^-1 * (A_Espargaro +
## A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Acosta + Aldeguer + Bagnaia + Bastianini +
## Bezzecchi + Binder + Bulega + Chantra + Di_Giannantonio + Marini +
## Martin + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli + Nakagami + Ogura + Oliveira +
## P_Espargaro + Pirro + Quartararo + R.Fernandez + Rins + Savadori +
## Vinales + Zarco)^-25)
moto_maxp <- maxp(L2025)
moto_maxp
##     A_Espargaro     A_Fernandez       A_Marquez          Acosta        Aldeguer 
##     0.004316523     0.007234397     0.128961578     0.072034026     0.051612257 
##         Bagnaia      Bastianini       Bezzecchi          Binder          Bulega 
##     0.049136461     0.034053084     0.080021489     0.036253176     0.001602649 
##         Chantra Di_Giannantonio       M_Marquez          Marini          Martin 
##     0.017390050     0.070879187     0.060303185     0.034703527     0.005826982 
##          Miller             Mir      Morbidelli        Nakagami           Ogura 
##     0.029287674     0.018202401     0.052388413     0.002702163     0.029567846 
##        Oliveira     P_Espargaro           Pirro      Quartararo     R.Fernandez 
##     0.022931175     0.005325206     0.002082314     0.045503934     0.038561344 
##            Rins        Savadori         Vinales           Zarco 
##     0.035135483     0.012427635     0.018303369     0.033252473
dotchart(moto_maxp,pch=16)

dotchart(log10(moto_maxp),pch=16)

## MotoGP 2024

head(MotoGP2024_Sprint)
## # A tibble: 6 × 23
##   Rider  Bike  Team  S.QAT S.POR S.AME S.SPA S.FRA S.CAT S.ITA S.NED S.GER S.GBR
##   <chr>  <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>
## 1 Martin Duca… Prim… 1     3     3     1     1     4     Ret   2     1     2    
## 2 Bagna… Duca… Duca… 4     4     8     Ret   Ret   Ret   1     1     3     Ret  
## 3 M.Mar… Duca… Gres… 5     2     2     6     2     2     2     Ret   6     Ret  
## 4 Basti… Duca… Duca… 6     6     6     Ret   4     5     Ret   4     4     1    
## 5 Binder KTM   RedB… 2     Ret   12    Ret   15    Ret   6     6     8     4    
## 6 Acosta KTM   RedB… 8     7     4     2     6     3     3     10    22    5    
## # ℹ 10 more variables: S.AUT <chr>, S.ARA <chr>, S.RSM <chr>, S.EMI <chr>,
## #   S.INA <chr>, S.JPN <chr>, S.AUS <chr>, S.THA <chr>, S.MAL <chr>,
## #   S.SLD <chr>
top5_sprint24 <- MotoGP2024_Sprint %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = S.QAT:S.SLD,
    names_to = "Sprint_Race24",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Position = as.numeric(Result),
    Sprint_Race24 = factor(Sprint_Race24, levels = names(MotoGP2024_Sprint)[4:23])
  )
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `mutate()`.
## ℹ In argument: `Position = as.numeric(Result)`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NA introdotti per coercizione
ggplot(top5_sprint24, aes(x = Sprint_Race24, y = Position, colour = Rider, group = Rider)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 Riders Sprint Race Performance 2024",
    x = "Sprint Race",
    y = "Finishing Position",
    colour = "Rider"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
## Warning: Removed 16 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

head(MotoGP2024_Race)
## # A tibble: 6 × 23
##   Rider  Bike  Team  QAT   POR   AME   SPA   FRA   CAT   ITA   NED   GER   GBR  
##   <chr>  <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>
## 1 Martin Duca… Prim… 3     1     4     Ret   1     2     3     2     Ret   2    
## 2 Bagna… Duca… Duca… 1     Ret   5     1     3     1     1     1     1     3    
## 3 M.Mar… Duca… Gres… 4     16    Ret   2     2     3     4     10    2     4    
## 4 Basti… Duca… Duca… 5     2     3     5     4     18    2     3     4     1    
## 5 Binder KTM   RedB… 2     4     9     6     8     8     10    6     9     Ret  
## 6 Acosta KTM   RedB… 9     3     2     10    Ret   13    5     Ret   7     9    
## # ℹ 10 more variables: AUT <chr>, ARA <chr>, RSM <chr>, EMI <chr>, INA <chr>,
## #   JPN <chr>, AUS <chr>, THA <chr>, MAL <chr>, SLD <chr>
top5_race24 <- MotoGP2024_Race %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = QAT:SLD,
    names_to = "Race24",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Position = as.numeric(Result),
    Race24 = factor(Race24, levels = names(MotoGP2024_Race)[4:23])
  )
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `mutate()`.
## ℹ In argument: `Position = as.numeric(Result)`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NA introdotti per coercizione
ggplot(top5_race24, aes(x = Race24, y = Position, colour = Rider, group = Rider)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 Riders Race Performance 2024",
    x = "Race",
    y = "Finishing Position",
    colour = "Rider"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

moto_2024<-read.table("GP_2024.txt")

L2024<- ordertable2supp(moto_2024[,-ncol(moto_2024)])
head(L2024)
## Warning in print.hyper2(x): powers have nonzero sum
## log(A_Espargaro^30 * (A_Espargaro + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Acosta +
## Bagnaia + Bastianini + Bezzecchi + Binder + Bradl + Di_Giannantonio +
## Gardner + Iannone + M_Marquez + Marini + Martin + Miller + Mir +
## Morbidelli + Nakagami + Oliveira + P_Espargaro + Pedrosa + Pirro +
## Quartararo + R_Fernandez + Rins + Savadori + Vinales + Zarco)^-40 *
## (A_Espargaro + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Acosta + Bagnaia + Bastianini
## + Bezzecchi + Binder + Bradl + Di_Giannantonio + Gardner + Iannone +
## M_Marquez + Marini + Martin + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli + Nakagami +
## Oliveira + P_Espargaro + Pedrosa + Pirro + Quartararo + R_Fernandez +
## Rins + Savadori + Zarco)^-3 * (A_Espargaro + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez +
## Acosta + Bagnaia + Bastianini + Bezzecchi + Binder + Bradl +
## Di_Giannantonio + Gardner + Iannone + M_Marquez + Marini + Miller + Mir
## + Morbidelli + Nakagami + Oliveira + P_Espargaro + Pedrosa + Pirro +
## Quartararo + R_Fernandez + Rins + Savadori + Vinales + Zarco)^-10 *
## (A_Espargaro + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Acosta + Bagnaia + Bastianini
## + Bezzecchi + Binder + Bradl + Di_Giannantonio + Gardner + Iannone +
## M_Marquez + Marini + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli + Nakagami + P_Espargaro
## + Pedrosa + Pirro + Quartararo + R_Fernandez + Rins + Savadori +
## Vinales + Zarco)^-1 * (A_Espargaro + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Acosta +
## Bagnaia + Bastianini + Bezzecchi + Binder + Bradl + Di_Giannantonio +
## Gardner + Iannone + Marini + Martin + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli +
## Nakagami + Oliveira + P_Espargaro + Pedrosa + Pirro + Quartararo +
## R_Fernandez + Rins + Savadori + Vinales + Zarco)^-4)
moto_maxp24 <- maxp(L2024)
moto_maxp24
##     A_Espargaro     A_Fernandez       A_Marquez          Acosta         Bagnaia 
##    0.0323036230    0.0183148134    0.0455139315    0.0331934002    0.0727059674 
##      Bastianini       Bezzecchi          Binder           Bradl Di_Giannantonio 
##    0.1243274055    0.0377846171    0.0460297884    0.0039498683    0.0230015353 
##         Gardner         Iannone       M_Marquez          Marini          Martin 
##    0.0025878857    0.0008580000    0.0874429128    0.0204922702    0.1601432792 
##          Miller             Mir      Morbidelli        Nakagami        Oliveira 
##    0.0329434405    0.0127168253    0.0402678172    0.0213221924    0.0195638485 
##     P_Espargaro         Pedrosa           Pirro      Quartararo     R_Fernandez 
##    0.0028470626    0.0004307326    0.0008659694    0.0438920658    0.0260149382 
##            Rins        Savadori         Vinales           Zarco 
##    0.0163230219    0.0043421924    0.0458297694    0.0239908258
dotchart(moto_maxp24,pch=16)

dotchart(log10(moto_maxp24),pch=16)

##MotoGP2023

head(MotoGP2023_Sprint)
## # A tibble: 6 × 23
##   Rider  Bike  Team  S.POR S.ARG S.AME S.SPA S.FRA S.ITA S.GER S.NED S.GBR S.AUT
##   <chr>  <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>
## 1 Bagna… Duca… Duca… 1     6     1     2     3     1     2     2     14    1    
## 2 Martin Duca… Prim… 2     8     3     4     1     3     1     6     6     3    
## 3 Bezze… Duca… Moon… Ret   2     6     9     7     2     7     1     2     Ret  
## 4 Binder KTM   RedB… 12    1     5     1     2     11    6     5     9     2    
## 5 Zarco  Duca… Prim… 8     12    11    8     6     4     5     13    4     Ret  
## 6 A.Esp… Apri… Apri… 6     Ret   4     Ret   8     8     9     4     5     7    
## # ℹ 10 more variables: S.CAT <chr>, S.RSM <chr>, S.IND <chr>, S.JPN <chr>,
## #   S.INA <chr>, S.AUS <chr>, S.THA <chr>, S.MAL <chr>, S.QAT <chr>,
## #   S.VAL <chr>
top5_sprint23 <- MotoGP2023_Sprint %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = S.POR:S.VAL,
    names_to = "Sprint_Race23",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Position = as.numeric(Result),
    Sprint_Race23 = factor(Sprint_Race23, levels = names(MotoGP2023_Sprint)[4:23])
  )
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `mutate()`.
## ℹ In argument: `Position = as.numeric(Result)`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NA introdotti per coercizione
ggplot(top5_sprint23, aes(x = Sprint_Race23, y = Position, colour = Rider, group = Rider)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5 Riders Sprint Race Performance 2023",
    x = "Sprint Race",
    y = "Finishing Position",
    colour = "Rider"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).
## Warning: Removed 9 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range

head(MotoGP2023_Race)
## # A tibble: 6 × 23
##   Rider  Bike  Team  POR   ARG   AME   SPA   FRA   ITA   GER   NED   GBR   AUT  
##   <chr>  <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>
## 1 Bagna… Duca… Duca… 1     16    Ret   1     Ret   1     2     1     2     1    
## 2 Martin Duca… Prim… Ret   5     Ret   4     2     2     1     5     6     7    
## 3 Bezze… Duca… Moon… 3     1     6     Ret   1     8     4     2     Ret   3    
## 4 Binder KTM   RedB… 6     17    13    2     6     5     Ret   4     3     2    
## 5 Zarco  Duca… Prim… 4     2     7     Ret   3     3     3     Ret   9     13   
## 6 A.Esp… Apri… Apri… 9     15    Ret   5     5     6     16    3     1     9    
## # ℹ 10 more variables: CAT <chr>, RSM <chr>, IND <chr>, JPN <chr>, INA <chr>,
## #   AUS <chr>, THA <chr>, MAL <chr>, QAT <chr>, VAL <chr>
top5_race23 <- MotoGP2023_Race %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = POR:VAL,
    names_to = "Race23",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Position = as.numeric(Result),
    Race23 = factor(Race23, levels = names(MotoGP2023_Race)[4:23])

  scale_y_reverse() +

    title = "Top 5 Riders Race Performance 2023",
    x = "Race",
    y = "Finishing Position",

## (`geom_line()`).

moto_2023<-read.table("GP_2023.txt")

L2023<- ordertable2supp(moto_2023[,-ncol(moto_2023)])
head(L2023)
## Warning in print.hyper2(x): powers have nonzero sum
## log(A_Espargaro^29 * (A_Espargaro + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Bagnaia +
## Bastianini + Bautista + Bezzecchi + Binder + Bradl + Crutchlow +
## Di_Ginnantonio + Folger + Lecuona + M_Marquez + Marini + Martin +
## Miller + Mir + Morbidelli + Nakagami + Oliveira + P_Espargaro + Pedrosa
## + Petrucci + Pirro + Quartararo + R_Fernandez + Rins + Savadori +
## Takahashi + Vinales)^-1 * (A_Espargaro + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez +
## Bagnaia + Bastianini + Bautista + Bezzecchi + Binder + Bradl +
## Crutchlow + Di_Ginnantonio + Folger + Lecuona + M_Marquez + Marini +
## Martin + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli + Nakagami + Oliveira + P_Espargaro
## + Pedrosa + Petrucci + Pirro + Quartararo + R_Fernandez + Rins +
## Savadori + Takahashi + Vinales + Zarco)^-39 * (A_Espargaro +
## A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Bagnaia + Bastianini + Bautista + Bezzecchi +
## Binder + Bradl + Crutchlow + Di_Ginnantonio + Folger + Lecuona +
## M_Marquez + Marini + Martin + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli + Nakagami +
## Oliveira + P_Espargaro + Pedrosa + Petrucci + Pirro + Quartararo +
## R_Fernandez + Savadori + Takahashi + Vinales + Zarco)^-1 * (A_Espargaro
## + A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Bagnaia + Bastianini + Bautista + Bezzecchi
## + Binder + Bradl + Crutchlow + Di_Ginnantonio + Folger + Lecuona +
## M_Marquez + Marini + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli + Nakagami + Oliveira +
## P_Espargaro + Pedrosa + Petrucci + Pirro + Quartararo + R_Fernandez +
## Rins + Savadori + Takahashi + Vinales + Zarco)^-13 * (A_Espargaro +
## A_Fernandez + A_Marquez + Bagnaia + Bastianini + Bautista + Bezzecchi +
## Binder + Bradl + Crutchlow + Di_Ginnantonio + Folger + Lecuona +
## M_Marquez + Martin + Miller + Mir + Morbidelli + Nakagami + Oliveira +
## P_Espargaro + Pedrosa + Petrucci + Pirro + Quartararo + R_Fernandez +
## Savadori + Takahashi + Vinales + Zarco)^-1)
moto_maxp23 <- maxp(L2023)
moto_maxp23
##    A_Espargaro    A_Fernandez      A_Marquez        Bagnaia     Bastianini 
##   3.454625e-02   2.589907e-02   2.658551e-02   1.373141e-01   1.510134e-02 
##       Bautista      Bezzecchi         Binder          Bradl      Crutchlow 
##   8.802540e-04   7.992972e-02   7.188223e-02   4.560836e-03   8.814079e-04 
## Di_Ginnantonio         Folger        Lecuona      M_Marquez         Marini 
##   3.614557e-02   4.408985e-03   5.735879e-03   2.173524e-02   4.566741e-02 
##         Martin         Miller            Mir     Morbidelli       Nakagami 
##   1.580136e-01   4.933043e-02   8.857283e-03   3.654203e-02   2.385177e-02 
##       Oliveira    P_Espargaro        Pedrosa       Petrucci          Pirro 
##   1.744155e-02   1.066348e-02   2.037694e-03   8.677581e-04   3.758963e-03 
##     Quartararo    R_Fernandez           Rins       Savadori      Takahashi 
##   3.983476e-02   2.488209e-02   5.300155e-03   4.175883e-03   1.001683e-06 
##        Vinales          Zarco 
##   4.913017e-02   5.403761e-02
dotchart(moto_maxp23,pch=16)

dotchart(log10(moto_maxp23),pch=16)

Note that the echo = FALSE parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
